headline: Rosenblatt Lowers its Price Target on PTC Inc. (PTC) to $190 from $220
summary: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) is one of the 10 Fastest Growing Edge Computing Stocks to Buy Now. On March 18, 2026, Rosenblatt lowered the price target on PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) to $190 from $220 and maintained a Buy rating following the company’s completed sale of its Kepware and ThingWorx businesses to TPG. The firm said the […]
